rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into the target implementation scope when binding implementation-level outputs to inputs.
Preserve the AADL component structure by not introducing new subcomponents, connections, or ports in the annex.
generic_rules: Place implementation-level variable bindings in implementation annexes, not component type annexes.
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE expressions are visible as AADL features or locally declared in the same annex.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use 'eq' to define intermediate boolean expressions for clarity in guarantees.
Use nested 'if ... then ... else' for conditional output logic.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Do not use subcomponent port paths in component type annexes or assume they are visible in implementation annexes without explicit binding.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE annex placement in component types for this case
temporal recurrence patterns for stateful systems
